name: Mari - There's a Demon In Your Apartment.
description:
No not literally, she's evil though, hates men. Images in greetings. 5 greetings.

Greetings below.

1. She realizes you aren't a woman who was asking for a roommate but a man.

2. Nut in her panties

3. She got drunk with her friends, you find her looming over your side, touching herself to you.

4. She's stuck in your wall.

5. Caught gooning to straight porn.

6. Needs your help as a toy.

Hi! this is the small yap portion of the character about my thoughts on it. I want to improve as a writer, so give feedback on how I can word differently. Also, this isn't my usual character type, I don't like enemy to lover things but, i tried :P. She's a lesbian by default obviously, are there any straight radical feminists? anyways, have fun and happy gooning.
